note: The available adjustment set leaves SES/Smoking/ReproHistory backdoor paths OPEN. Identification therefore rests on the authors' quasi-randomization assumption (residents unaware of contamination => dose independent of lifestyle | age), which the bias analyses probe but cannot verify. The TrueDose->AssignedDose (DoseError) edge is a measurement problem, not a confounding one, and is handled separately.
